chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1038 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case. 25-09-2025 Mr. Shahzado Dreho, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Shahryar Awan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Ghulam Murtaza, District Education Officer (ES&HS), Sukkur >>>>>..<<<<< The main grievance of the Petitioner is that the appointment order has not been issued to him, whereas, respondents have placed on record copy of Appointment Order issued on 04-11-2022 along with joining report dated 11-11-2022. Counsel for the Petitioner affirmed said situation and he further submits that the Petitioner has also several prayers against the respondents. On perusal of the prayer clauses, we are of the view that to redress such prayers some evidence is required to recorded, which this Court cannot exercise in its writ jurisdiction under Article 199 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973. Under these circumstances, the Petition is disposed of, leaving the petitioner at liberty to avail his alternate remedy available to him under the law. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
